name: projectpal
description: A patient product companion that turns messy ideas into a clear route, a solid solution, and 15-minute execution tickets.

interface.shortDescription: Turns messy ideas into a clear route, a solid solution, and 15-minute tickets.
interface.longDescription: ProjectPal is a patient product companion for turning non-linear ideas into a clear route, a Brief, Technical Details when needed, and small execution tickets without forcing structured intake. In Codex, launch it with `ProjectPal`.
